_comment: VENDORED port-type vocabulary. The canonical vocabulary lives at Data-Flow-Advisory/orchestrator@feat/drift-gate/types.json (per CONNECTORS.md), which is UNREACHABLE to the fleet token (HTTP 404 on the whole orchestrator repo, 2026-06-11). These JSON-primitive type names are vendored so the conformance check is self-contained and green. organ-scrum-service's ports all map onto these primitives, so this organ proposes NO new type. The type *names* must be reconciled with the canonical orchestrator types.json once it is readable. See the PR description.
